channel.title: My New Hugo Project
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Project

item.title: Designing an Enterprise Data Classification Policy for Healthcare
item.description: In healthcare IT, data governance isn’t just a corporate checklist—it’s a legal shield and a foundational pillar of patient trust. Managing a mixture of Protected Health Information (PHI), financial metrics, and day-to-day internal communications requires a systematic approach.

item.title: Security Policy Compliance Assessment & Roadmap
item.description:
Executive Summary

RetailMax Corporation is positioning itself for major business growth by pursuing PCI-DSS v4.0, ISO 27001:2022, and SOC 2 Type II certifications. However, the current security policy infrastructure introduces significant compliance and legal risk.

A thorough review reveals that several core policies are completely missing (Incident Response, Data Classification, Access Control), while existing policies are outdated (ranging from 2019 to 2021) and fail to reflect modern security landscapes.
